TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_lungi

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a matuasay tayni cingra i itira i lutuk.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人來到山上。
There was an elder coming to the mountain.

S.FORM: mikalic cingra tu ccay a kilang mipitpit cingra tu heci u kyafes mipitpit cingra i.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上一棵樹摘番石榴。
He climbed up a tree and plucked guavas.

S.FORM: matumes tu ku lufuc i itini i itini lufuc nira i.
S.TRANSL: 他的袋子滿了。
His bag was full.

S.FORM: maepud cingra miparu itini i fakar tuya mi pitpitan nira a heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他下來把水果裝到籃子裡。
He went down and put the fruits in the basket.

S.FORM: nikawrila ira ku c’cay a wawa tu mikulisiway mita’elif tu nira a kilang i.
S.TRANSL: 有一個騎腳踏車的小孩經過樹。
There was a child who rode a bike. He passed the tree.

S.FORM: maaraw nira kurira a matuasay mipitpit ifafa’ tu heci nurira kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他看到那個老人在摘水果。
He saw that that elder was picking fruits.

S.FORM: ca’ay pinengneng kurira a matuasay alahan nura wawa kura matumesay tu a paru a fakar tu heci nu na kilang paru nira padadakaw itini i kulisiw.
S.TRANSL: 老人沒看到小孩拿了一籃裝滿果實的籃子，然後還用腳踏車把它們運走。
The elder didn’t see that the child took a basket that was full of fruits and that he put them on his bike and carried them away.

S.FORM: ta milaliw cingra.
S.TRANSL: 然後他(小孩子)就離開了。
Then, he (the child) left.

S.FORM: ca’ay kafana kunini a matuasay.
S.TRANSL: 這個老人不知道(這些事)。
The elder didn’t know this.

S.FORM: tahira i fatad kunini a wawa ira ku saka lalitemuh nira a c’cay a fafahiyan a wawa tu mikulisiway.
S.TRANSL: 半路上，小孩遇到一個騎腳踏車的女生。
Halfway, the child met a girl who rode a bike.

S.FORM: ma tata’elif cangra i nunini a pikulisiway a fafahian kunini a wawa tu fayinayan tu mialaay tu ni talu cay i fakar a mipitpitan nira heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: aaa
aaa

S.FORM: ma pulin kunini a fayinayan a wawa tu mikulisiway malaklak ku nialaan nira a.
S.TRANSL: 騎腳踏車的男孩跌倒了，他拿的東西散落一地。
The boy who rode a bike fell, and what he took were scattered.

S.FORM: miparu itini i kulisiw a fakar laklak sa tu kunini a heci.
S.TRANSL: 果實散落一地，他把它們裝到腳踏車上。
The fruits were scattered, so he put them on the bike.

S.FORM: itiya i ira ku tatuluay a wawa tuni padanghan nira a miparu kunini a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 有三個小孩，他們幫那個孩子。
There were three children, and they helped the child.

S.FORM: pudpudhan tu nira kuya heci nu kilang a miparu itini i fakar.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙小孩子把水果放到籃子裡。
They helped the child put the fruits in the basket.

S.FORM: maherek itu i lumuwad tu cingra minukay.
S.TRANSL: 完成後，他起身回家。
After it is done, he got up and went home.

S.FORM: matawal nira ku kafeng celi’han nuya mita’elifay a tatuluay a wawa i.
S.TRANSL: 他忘了帽子，那三個小孩叫他
He forgot the hat, so the three children called him.

S.FORM: tireng sa cingra miala cingra tu pafeli’ nuya tatuluay a wawa tu c’cay i cingranan a kafeng.
S.TRANSL: 他給每個小孩一個(番石榴)。
He gave each of the three children one (guava).

S.FORM: pa pa minukay tu cingra.
S.TRANSL: 他回家了。
He went home.

S.FORM: maepud kuya matuasay minengneng cingra tuya fakar awaay tu ku c’cay.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人下來，他看到一個籃子不見了。
The elder went down and saw that one basket was gone.

S.FORM: i cima kumialaay sa’an cingra.
S.TRANSL: 「誰拿了？」他這麼說。
‘Who took it?’, he said.

S.FORM: sa’an ira kuya tatuluay mita’elif mitatuy tuya heci nu kilang cangra a kuma’en.
S.TRANSL: 有三個小孩經過，他們拿著水果在吃。
There were three children passing by, and they were holding and eating the fruits.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nuya matuasay unini hakini kumialaay.
S.TRANSL: 老人看到，納悶著是不是他們拿的。
The elder saw this, wondering whether they took (the guavas).

S.FORM: sa’an a minengneng itiya ta’elif sa tu tireng sa tu kunini a matuasay a miharateng tu malahelaway a nialaan nira a heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: aaa
aaa

S.FORM: hatira aca ku suwal nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣。
That’s it.
